name: Extended Euclidean algorithm
task: Create /tmp/eval_xgcd/xgcd.py with extgcd(a, b) returning a tuple (g, x, y) where g = gcd(a, b) and a*x + b*y == g (Bezout identity). Iterative implementation preferred; both inputs are non-negative ints, at least one is positive.

validation.script: import importlib.util; spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location('m','/tmp/eval_xgcd/xgcd.py'); mod = importlib.util.module_from_spec(spec); spec.loader.exec_module(mod); E = mod.extgcd; g,x,y = E(48,18); assert g == 6 and 48*x+18*y == 6; g,x,y = E(101,13); assert g == 1 and 101*x+13*y == 1; g,x,y = E(270,192); assert g == 6 and 270*x+192*y == 6; print('OK')
